templates.title: New Enquiry Welcome
templates.purpose: Instantly acknowledge a fresh property enquiry
templates.description: Instantly acknowledge a fresh property enquiry
templates.message:
Hi {{CustomerName}}! 👋

Thank you for your interest in {{ProjectName}}. I’m {{AgentName}} from {{CompanyName}}.

How can I help you today?
1. Price & availability
2. Brochure
3. Site visit
4. Speak with an expert

templates.title: Source-Aware Lead Welcome
templates.purpose: Acknowledge the lead source and confirm the project
templates.description: Acknowledge the lead source and confirm the project
templates.message:
Hello {{CustomerName}}, thank you for your enquiry through {{LeadSource}} regarding {{ProjectName}} in {{Location}}.

Would you prefer details in English or Hindi?

templates.title: Complete Lead Qualification
templates.purpose: Collect purchase requirements in a friendly sequence
templates.description: Collect purchase requirements in a friendly sequence
templates.message:
Hi {{CustomerName}}, to recommend the best options, please share:

• Buying purpose: self-use or investment
• Property type
• Preferred location
• Budget range
• Configuration
• Purchase timeline
• Payment method

You may reply in one message.

templates.title: Budget & Timeline Check
templates.purpose: Quickly understand budget and purchase readiness
templates.description: Quickly understand budget and purchase readiness
templates.message: Hi {{CustomerName}}, what budget range and purchase timeline are you considering for a {{PropertyType}} in {{Location}}?

templates.title: Requirement Confirmation Summary
templates.purpose: Confirm captured requirements before recommendations
templates.description: Confirm captured requirements before recommendations

templates.title: Single Property Recommendation
templates.purpose: Recommend one well-matched project
templates.description: Recommend one well-matched project

templates.title: Investor Property Recommendation
templates.purpose: Share a suitable investment option without promising returns
templates.description: Share a suitable investment option without promising returns
templates.message:
Hello {{CustomerName}}, considering your budget of {{Budget}}, {{ProjectName}} in {{Location}} may be worth evaluating. Starting price is {{Price}}.

Please independently verify pricing, approvals, rental potential and associated risks. Would you like an expert callback?

templates.title: Site Visit Confirmation
templates.purpose: Confirm a scheduled property visit
templates.description: Confirm a scheduled property visit

templates.title: Two-Hour Site Visit Reminder
templates.purpose: Remind a customer shortly before the visit
templates.description: Remind a customer shortly before the visit
templates.message:
Hi {{CustomerName}}, a quick reminder that your visit to {{ProjectName}} is scheduled today at {{VisitTime}}.

Need help or running late? Call {{ConsultantName}} at {{ConsultantPhone}}.

templates.title: 24-Hour Enquiry Follow-Up
templates.purpose: Continue a property enquiry after one day
templates.description: Continue a property enquiry after one day
templates.message: Hi {{CustomerName}}, checking whether you had a chance to review {{ProjectName}}. I can share current availability, pricing or arrange a site visit based on your convenience.

templates.title: Respectful Final Follow-Up
templates.purpose: Close an inactive follow-up sequence respectfully
templates.description: Close an inactive follow-up sequence respectfully
templates.message: Hi {{CustomerName}}, this is our final follow-up regarding {{ProjectName}}. If you are still interested, reply *YES* and {{ConsultantName}} will assist you. Reply *STOP* if you do not want further messages.

templates.title: Negotiation Callback Request
templates.purpose: Escalate a serious price discussion
templates.description: Escalate a serious price discussion
templates.message:
Hi {{CustomerName}}, we understand your expected budget is {{Budget}} for {{ProjectName}}. We can request an approved offer review.

Would you like a negotiation call with {{ConsultantName}} at your preferred time?

templates.title: Property Booking Confirmation
templates.purpose: Summarize a verified property booking
templates.description: Summarize a verified property booking

templates.title: Upcoming Payment Reminder
templates.purpose: Remind a booked customer before the due date
templates.description: Remind a booked customer before the due date
templates.message:
Hello {{CustomerName}}, this is a reminder that your upcoming payment for {{ProjectName}} is due on {{DueDate}}.

Please use only the verified payment channel. For assistance, contact {{ConsultantName}} at {{ConsultantPhone}}.

templates.title: New Project Launch Announcement
templates.purpose: Announce a new launch with an interest CTA
templates.description: Announce a new launch with an interest CTA
templates.message:
New launch alert 🏙️

Introducing *{{ProjectName}}* in {{Location}}, with {{Configuration}} options starting from {{Price}}.

Explore the brochure: {{BrochureLink}}
Reply *INTERESTED* for verified details and a priority callback.

templates.title: Festive Property Offer
templates.purpose: Share a time-bound festive campaign
templates.description: Share a time-bound festive campaign
templates.message:
Festive greetings from {{CompanyName}}! ✨

A special offer is available on selected units at {{ProjectName}} until {{OfferValidity}}. Terms, inventory and final pricing are subject to official confirmation.

Reply *CALLBACK* or book a site visit.

templates.title: Existing Customer Support Menu
templates.purpose: Route an existing customer to the right support team
templates.description: Route an existing customer to the right support team
templates.message:
Hi {{CustomerName}}, how can we help with your booking at {{ProjectName}}?

1. Payment issue
2. Document issue
3. Construction update
4. Possession enquiry
5. Register a complaint
6. Speak with support

templates.title: Home Loan Expert Callback
templates.purpose: Arrange a home-loan consultation
templates.description: Arrange a home-loan consultation
templates.message: Hi {{CustomerName}}, we can arrange a home-loan expert callback for {{ProjectName}}. Please share your employment type, approximate income range, required loan amount and preferred bank. Final eligibility depends on the lender’s assessment.

templates.title: नई प्रॉपर्टी लीड स्वागत
templates.purpose: नई enquiry का सरल Hindi स्वागत
templates.description: नई enquiry का सरल Hindi स्वागत
templates.message:
नमस्ते {{CustomerName}} जी 👋

{{ProjectName}} में रुचि दिखाने के लिए धन्यवाद। मैं {{CompanyName}} से {{AgentName}} हूँ।

आपको price, brochure या site visit में से किसकी जानकारी चाहिए?

templates.title: Requirement पूछने का Message
templates.purpose: ग्राहक की मुख्य property requirement जानें
templates.description: ग्राहक की मुख्य property requirement जानें
templates.message:
नमस्ते {{CustomerName}} जी, सही property suggest करने के लिए कृपया बताएं:

• खरीद self-use या investment के लिए है?
• Preferred location
• Budget range
• 2/3 BHK या अन्य configuration
• Purchase timeline
• Home loan चाहिए या self-payment?

templates.title: 24 घंटे का Follow-Up
templates.purpose: एक दिन बाद विनम्र follow-up
templates.description: एक दिन बाद विनम्र follow-up
templates.message: नमस्ते {{CustomerName}} जी, क्या आपको {{ProjectName}} की details देखने का समय मिला? मैं current price, availability या site visit arrange करने में मदद कर सकता हूँ।

templates.title: Site Visit Reminder Hindi
templates.purpose: site visit से पहले reminder
templates.description: site visit से पहले reminder
templates.message: नमस्ते {{CustomerName}} जी, आपकी {{ProjectName}} site visit {{VisitDate}} को {{VisitTime}} बजे scheduled है। किसी सहायता के लिए {{ConsultantName}} को {{ConsultantPhone}} पर संपर्क करें।

templates.title: Booking Confirmation Hindi
templates.purpose: booking details का स्पष्ट summary
templates.description: booking details का स्पष्ट summary

templates.title: Customer Support Hindi
templates.purpose: existing customer support options
templates.description: existing customer support options
templates.message:
नमस्ते {{CustomerName}} जी, {{ProjectName}} से संबंधित किस विषय में सहायता चाहिए?

1. Payment
2. Documents
3. Construction update
4. Possession
5. Complaint
6. Human support
